title: Add user profile page with backend endpoint and frontend component
prompt: Implement a user profile page. Backend: add GET /users/{id} endpoint returning name, email, and role. Frontend: add a ProfilePage React component that fetches and displays the profile data. Include loading and error states. Wire the route into the app router.

rubric.notes: Multi-surface greenfield task spanning src/ and frontend/. Both surface AGENTS.md files must be read before editing. frontend-best-practices skill required.
